attack_surface.data_description: Exploitable vulnerability in $BGT reward claiming mechanism (via BeraHub 208 / Reward Vault 209).

security_gap.gap_description: Reward claiming contracts may have flaws allowing users to claim more than entitled.

actor_risk.description: A malicious Liquidity Provider (Actor 4) could exploit vulnerabilities in the reward claiming process.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vulnerabilities in reward distribution can lead to theft of $BGT.

assumptions: The smart contracts governing $BGT claims (e.g., Reward Vault 209, BeraHub 208) have an exploitable vulnerability.
The Liquidity Provider (4) has the knowledge and intent to exploit this.

mitigation.strategy: Comprehensive smart contract audits, secure accounting of rewards, formal verification.

description: A malicious Liquidity Provider (4) exploits a vulnerability in the $BGT reward claiming mechanism (via BeraHub 208 / Reward Vault 209) (behavior 521) to claim more $BGT (102) than they are legitimately entitled to.
